Tests for Bluetooth, app functionalities, bitmap rendering, CPU cache, persistence, text rendering, and more.

## Folders
- **[bluetooth](bluetooth/README.md)**: Tests for BLE advertisement and iBeacon data parsing, and build script for Bluetooth-related C files.

## Files
- **[test_app_glance.c](test_app_glance.c.md)**: Tests for the app glance functionality in the Pebble firmware, including slice management and validation.
- **[test_app_inbox.c](test_app_inbox.c.md)**: Tests for the app inbox service in the Pebble firmware, including message handling, registration, and error scenarios.
- **[test_app_message.c](test_app_message.c.md)**: Tests for the app message functionality in the Pebble firmware, including handling of message sending, receiving, and error conditions.
- **[test_app_outbox.c](test_app_outbox.c.md)**: Unit tests for the app outbox functionality in the Pebble firmware, including message handling and error conditions.
- **[test_app_smartstrap.c](test_app_smartstrap.c.md)**: Tests for the Smartstrap functionality in the Pebble firmware, including read, write, and notification operations.
- **[test_bitmap_layer.c](test_bitmap_layer.c.md)**: Tests for bitmap layer rendering behavior in different SDK versions, including legacy support.
- **[test_cpu_cache.c](test_cpu_cache.c.md)**: Tests for CPU cache functionality, including alignment, user space validation, and cache enablement scenarios.
- **[test_pbl_std.c](test_pbl_std.c.md)**: Tests for the `pbl_std` library, including `snprintf`, `memcpy`, and `difftime` functionality.
- **[test_persist.c](test_persist.c.md)**: Tests for the persistence functionality in the Pebble firmware, including read, write, and delete operations.
- **[test_template_string.c](test_template_string.c.md)**: Tests for the `template_string` functionality in the `pebble-firmware` codebase, including truncation, null arguments, time filters, format filters, and pipeline parsing.
- **[test_text_render.c](test_text_render.c.md)**: Tests for converting 1-bit to 8-bit graphics in different resolutions using the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_text_resources.c](test_text_resources.c.md)**: Tests for text resource functionalities in the Pebble firmware, including font initialization and glyph handling.
- **[test_unobstructed_area_service.c](test_unobstructed_area_service.c.md)**: Tests for the unobstructed area service in the Pebble firmware, including subscription and event handling.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling and testing various firmware components using the `clar` function.
